overview:
## Discussion

Set this value to a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] object when the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecPaddingKey] attribute is set to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecPaddingOAEPKey]. If you don’t set this attribute, a zero length data object is used by default.

This attribute is ignored when padding is not set to OAEP.

# kSecOAEPEncodingParametersAttributeName

**Global Variable**

The OAEP encoding parameters.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecOAEPEncodingParametersAttributeName: CFString
```

## Discussion

Set this value to a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFData] object when the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecPaddingKey] attribute is set to [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecPaddingOAEPKey]. If you don’t set this attribute, a zero length data object is used by default.

This attribute is ignored when padding is not set to OAEP.
title: kSecOAEPEncodingParametersAttributeName
